legislative_measures.description: Puerto Rico legislative measures discovered through LegislaPR and promoted only after OpenStates plus official Assembly/SUTRA confirmation.

columns.name: measure_id
columns.description: Canonical Puerto Rico legislative identifier, for example PS 782 or PC 123.

columns.name: measure_type
columns.description: Bill, joint resolution, concurrent resolution, simple resolution, nomination, or other measure type when extractable.

columns.name: chamber
columns.description: House, Senate, or other chamber label when extractable.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current legislative status shown on the discovery page.

columns.name: summary
columns.description: Discovery summary; non-authoritative unless corroborated by official text.

columns.name: authors
columns.description: JSON array of listed authors/sponsors when extractable.

columns.name: document_urls
columns.description: JSON array of measure document URLs discovered on the page.

columns.name: fiscal_language_detected
columns.description: True when appropriation, budget, allocation, contract, emergency, bond, or public-corporation fiscal language is detected.

columns.name: extraction_confidence
columns.description: 0.0-1.0 confidence based on direct field extraction and canonical-link coverage.
